_comment: T-024: every row below has label_source=agent_placeholder - these are NOT the founder's hand-labels. They exist so the script/infrastructure is real and testable, but judge_agreement computed against them measures LLM self-consistency, not agreement with human judgment. Replace every row's claim_labels/citation_labels with genuine independent labels (see --print-blind) before treating any calibration number as authoritative.

question: If I sell my phone after a repair, does the new owner still have warranty?
answer: Yes - our 90-day repair warranty travels with the device, not the original customer [1]. The new owner just needs the original receipt to claim it [1].

chunks.content: Every repair we perform is covered by a 90-day warranty against defects in parts and workmanship. Warranty coverage travels with the device, not the original customer; the new owner needs the original receipt to claim it.

claims: the repair warranty lasts 90 days
warranty coverage travels with the device rather than the original customer
the new owner needs the original receipt to claim the warranty

question: How long will a water damage assessment take?
answer: Water damage assessments take three to five business days [1]. We also waive the diagnostic fee if you decline the repair [1].

chunks.content: Water damage assessments can take three to five business days, as they require a diagnostic soak and component-level testing.

claims: water damage assessments take three to five business days
the diagnostic fee is waived if you decline the repair

question: What happens if I don't pick up my phone after repair?
answer: Devices left unclaimed after 30 days incur a small daily storage fee [2]. The fee is waived if you tell us in advance you'll be delayed [1].

chunks.content: Most screen repairs are completed the same day, usually within two to three hours of drop-off.
Devices left unclaimed after 30 days are subject to a small daily storage fee, waived if you let us know in advance that you'll be delayed.

claims: unclaimed devices incur a daily storage fee after 30 days
the storage fee is waived with advance notice of delay

question: Can I get a refund if I change my mind after picking up my repaired phone?
answer: Yes, a full refund is available within 14 days after pickup, as long as the part hasn't been damaged by misuse [1].

chunks.content: If you change your mind after a repair is finished and picked up, we offer a full refund within 14 days as long as the part has not been damaged by misuse.

claims: a full refund is offered within 14 days of pickup
the refund requires the part not be damaged by misuse

question: Is there a fee if I cancel before you start working on my phone?
answer: Cancelling before the device has been opened is always free [1]. Once a part has been installed, a full refund is guaranteed with no restocking charge [1].

chunks.content: Cancelling before we've opened the device is always free; once a part has been installed, a restocking portion of the price may apply since the part can no longer be resold as new.

claims: cancelling before the device is opened is free
installing a part guarantees a full refund with no restocking charge

question: Will you access my photos during a screen repair?
answer: No - they never access personal data, accounts, or photos during a hardware repair [1]. Software or data-recovery jobs are handled by any available technician without a consent form [1].

chunks.content: We never access personal data, accounts, or photos during a hardware repair. For software or data-recovery work specifically, we ask you to sign a separate consent form, and only the technician assigned to your device has access.

claims: personal data, accounts, and photos are never accessed during a hardware repair
software or data-recovery jobs are handled by any available technician with no consent form required

question: Will you match a quote I got from another repair shop?
answer: Yes, they price match a written quote from another licensed repair shop for the same part and device [1], as long as the part quality is equivalent - OEM to OEM, aftermarket to aftermarket [1].

chunks.content: Bring a written quote from another licensed repair shop for the same part and device, and we will match it as long as the part quality is equivalent (OEM to OEM, aftermarket to aftermarket).

claims: a written quote from another licensed repair shop for the same part and device gets matched
the matched part quality must be equivalent, OEM to OEM or aftermarket to aftermarket

question: Do you have loaner phones while mine is being repaired?
answer: Yes, they keep a small number of basic loaner phones for repairs taking more than a day, such as water damage cases [1]. Loaners are unlimited and free of charge [1].

chunks.content: We keep a small number of basic loaner phones for customers whose repair will take more than a day, such as water damage cases. Ask at drop-off - loaners are first-come, first-served and require a small refundable deposit.

claims: a small number of basic loaner phones are kept for repairs taking more than a day
loaners are unlimited and free of charge

question: How much is a screen repair for a budget Android phone?
answer: Budget and mid-range Android phone screen replacement starts at 59 dollars [1].

chunks.content: Screen repair pricing depends on device tier. Budget and mid-range Android phones start at 59 dollars for a screen replacement.

claims: budget and mid-range Android screen replacement starts at 59 dollars

question: What does a flagship OEM screen replacement cost compared to aftermarket?
answer: A standard aftermarket flagship screen is 129 dollars [1]. An OEM display is only slightly more at 139 dollars [1].

chunks.content: Flagship phones like recent iPhones and Samsung Galaxy models are 129 dollars for a standard aftermarket screen, or 179 dollars if you want an original OEM display.

claims: a standard aftermarket flagship screen is 129 dollars
an OEM flagship display is 139 dollars

question: Can you give me a screen repair price for my tablet?
answer: Tablet screens are priced individually since sizes vary so much [1] - ask at drop-off for a quote [1].

chunks.content: Tablets are priced individually since screen sizes vary so much - ask at drop-off for a quote.

claims: tablet screens are priced individually because sizes vary
a quote can be requested at drop-off

question: How much to fix a foldable phone's screen?
answer: Foldable phone screens are handled as a special order and are quoted after the device is seen [1]. The repair is a flat rate of 250 dollars [1].

chunks.content: Foldable phone screens are handled as a special order and quoted after we see the device, since parts and labor vary widely between models.

claims: foldable screens are a special order quoted after seeing the device
foldable screen repair has a flat rate of 250 dollars

question: What's the price difference between a standard and flagship battery replacement?
answer: A standard battery replacement is 49 dollars for most phones [1], while flagship models with larger batteries are 69 dollars [1].

chunks.content: A standard battery replacement is 49 dollars for most phones, or 69 dollars for flagship models with larger batteries.

claims: a standard battery replacement is 49 dollars
a flagship battery replacement is 69 dollars

question: How much does a charging port repair cost?
answer: Charging port repair, covering a loose or non-functioning port, is 45 dollars [1]. It always includes a free replacement cable [1].

chunks.content: Charging port repair, which covers a loose or non-functioning charging port, is 45 dollars.

claims: charging port repair is 45 dollars
charging port repair always includes a free replacement cable

question: My phone won't charge at all - do you charge for a diagnostic before quoting the fix?
answer: No, a free diagnostic is run first to confirm whether it's the port or something else, before quoting [1].

chunks.content: If your phone won't charge at all, we run a free diagnostic first to confirm whether it's the port or something else before quoting.

claims: a free diagnostic is run first to determine the cause before quoting

question: What's the fee for a general diagnostic?
answer: A general diagnostic fee is 20 dollars [1]. It's non-refundable even if you proceed with the repair [1].

chunks.content: A general diagnostic fee is 20 dollars, waived if you proceed with the recommended repair.

claims: the general diagnostic fee is 20 dollars
the diagnostic fee is non-refundable even if you proceed with the repair

question: What does rush service cost?
answer: Rush service moves your repair to the front of the queue [1], for a flat 15 dollar add-on on top of the repair price [1].

chunks.content: Rush service, which moves your repair to the front of the queue, is a flat 15 dollar add-on on top of the repair price.

claims: rush service moves the repair to the front of the queue
rush service costs a flat 15 dollar add-on

question: How much is a wireless charging coil replacement?
answer: Wireless charging coil replacement is 55 dollars [1], needed when a phone charges by cable but not on a pad [1].

chunks.content: Wireless charging coil replacement, needed when a phone stops charging on a pad but still charges by cable, is 55 dollars.

claims: wireless charging coil replacement is 55 dollars
the coil replacement is needed when a phone charges by cable but not wirelessly

question: Do I need to book an appointment before coming in?
answer: No, walk-ins are always welcome [1]. Booking ahead is required on weekends [1].

chunks.content: No, walk-ins are always welcome. Booking ahead online just guarantees you a same-day slot during busy periods like weekends.

claims: walk-ins are always welcome, no appointment needed
booking ahead is required on weekends

question: Can you repair a phone I didn't originally buy from you?
answer: Yes, they repair any brand and model they stock parts for, regardless of where it was bought [1]. Proof of purchase is required for every repair [1].

chunks.content: Yes, we repair any brand and model we stock parts for, regardless of where you bought the phone. We do not require proof of purchase for a repair, only for warranty claims on repairs we previously performed ourselves.

claims: any brand/model they stock parts for gets repaired regardless of origin
proof of purchase is required for every repair

question: Are your technicians certified?
answer: Every technician completes an in-house certification program before working unsupervised [1], and senior technicians hold manufacturer-recognized certifications where they exist [1].

chunks.content: Every technician completes an in-house certification program covering all the device families we service before working unsupervised, and senior technicians hold manufacturer-recognized repair certifications where they exist.

claims: every technician completes an in-house certification program before working unsupervised
senior technicians hold manufacturer-recognized certifications where they exist

question: If my phone breaks again after a repair but it's a different problem, what happens?
answer: An issue related to the part they replaced is covered by the 90-day warranty at no extra charge [1]. A different, unrelated issue is fixed for free too [1].

chunks.content: Any issue related to the part we replaced is covered by the 90-day warranty at no extra charge. If it is a different, unrelated issue, we will diagnose it and give you a new quote before doing any further work.

claims: an issue related to the replaced part is covered by warranty at no charge
a different unrelated issue is diagnosed and quoted before any further work

question: What happens to my data during a repair?
answer: Hardware repairs like screens and batteries essentially never touch your data [1]. Backing up your device before any repair is recommended [1].

chunks.content: We recommend backing up your device before any repair, though hardware repairs like screens and batteries essentially never touch your data.

claims: hardware repairs like screens and batteries essentially never touch your data
backing up before any repair is recommended

question: What if my phone is still broken after the repair, and can it be a different device entirely?
answer: Any issue related to the part they replaced is covered by warranty at no charge [1]. They will also swap your phone for a brand new model for free if this happens twice [1].

chunks.content: Any issue related to the part we replaced is covered by the 90-day warranty at no extra charge. If it is a different, unrelated issue, we will diagnose it and give you a new quote before doing any further work.

claims: a warranty-covered issue is fixed at no charge
a free brand-new phone swap is offered if the issue recurs twice

question: Is the diagnostic fee waived if I go ahead with the repair?
answer: Yes, diagnostic fees are waived if you proceed with the recommended repair [1].

chunks.content: A general diagnostic fee is 20 dollars, waived if you proceed with the recommended repair.

claims: the diagnostic fee is waived when proceeding with the recommended repair

question: Can I get my device fixed after hours?
answer: If you need after-hours pickup, ask at drop-off and they will arrange it [1]. Same-day appointments are guaranteed for all after-hours requests [1].

chunks.content: You can pick up during business hours; if you need after-hours pickup, ask at drop-off and we will arrange it.

claims: after-hours pickup can be arranged by asking at drop-off
same-day appointments are guaranteed for after-hours requests

question: If the repair fails, do I still owe anything?
answer: No - if they are unable to complete a repair, you owe nothing and get your device back as-is [1].

chunks.content: If we are unable to complete a repair, you owe nothing and get your device back as-is.

claims: owing nothing and getting the device back as-is applies when a repair can't be completed

question: How long does a screen repair usually take, and do you offer same-day for every repair type?
answer: Most screen repairs are completed the same day, usually within two to three hours [1]. Every single repair type, including water damage, is guaranteed same-day [1].

chunks.content: Most screen repairs and battery replacements are completed the same day, usually within two to three hours of drop-off. Water damage assessments and motherboard-level repairs can take three to five business days because they require a diagnostic soak and component-level testing.

claims: most screen repairs are completed the same day within two to three hours
every repair type including water damage is guaranteed same-day

question: What's covered under your repair warranty?
answer: Every repair is covered by a 90-day warranty against defects in parts and workmanship [1], and the same issue recurring within that window is fixed again at no charge [1].

chunks.content: Every repair we perform is covered by a 90-day warranty against defects in parts and workmanship. If the same issue recurs within that window, we will fix it again at no charge.

claims: every repair is covered by a 90-day warranty against defects
the same issue recurring within 90 days is fixed again at no charge
